Oracc: SAAo/SAA01 — The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West

SAA 01 228. On the Chief Confectioner (to the Governor of Calah) (GPA 230)[via saao/saa01]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[a-na] ⸢LÚv⸣.EN.NAM ⸢EN⸣-[a]

(1) [To] the governor, [my lo]rd: your servant Nabû-dammiq. Good health to my lord!

o 22

⸢ARAD-ka m⸣dPA—SIG₅-⸢iq⸣

o 33

lu DI-mu a-na EN-a

o 44

LÚv.GAL—SUM.NINDA i-da-⸢bu⸣-ub

o 55

⸢ma⸣-a ana-ku mDI—EN—⸢la⸣-[áš-me]

(5) The Chief Confectioner says: "I (and) Šulmu-beli-l[ašme will ret]urn to the city of [......"

o 66

[i-sa?]-ḫur a-na URU.[x x]

o 77

[x x x x] ⸢x⸣+[x x x x]

rest broken away

(Rest too broken for translation)

Reverse
rr beginning broken away

r 1'1'

⸢pi?⸣ [x x x x x]+⸢x⸣

r 2'2'

ša ⸢x⸣+[x x x x] ma?

r 3'3'

[x x x]+⸢x⸣ ina UGU ⸢x⸣+[x x]

Right
r.e. 4r.e. 4

[x x] ⸢i-tal-ku⸣

Edge
e. 1e. 1

[x x x x x x x x] ú [x x]

e. 22

[x x x x x x x x] pa-na-⸢tú⸣-[x x]

Adapted from Simo Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2009-11, as part of the AHRC-funded research project “Mechanisms of Communication in an Ancient Empire: The Correspondence between the King of Assyria and his Magnates in the 8th Century BC” (AH/F016581/1; University College London) directed by Karen Radner. The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P428858/.
